oracleReaderQuery.value:
SELECT DISTINCT
  project_id, requisition_no, req_rev, req_originator, req_date, released_to_proc, proc_ack_date,
  DECODE(attr_char3,
    'PROJECT', mdr_pack_number,
    'MRO', mg_lookup_code,
    DECODE(mdr_pack_number, '-', mg_lookup_code, mdr_pack_number)
  ) matl_wrk_grp,
  DECODE(attr_char3,
    'PROJECT', mg_nls_proj_desc,
    'MRO', mg_nls_mro_desc,
    DECODE(mdr_pack_number, '-', mg_nls_mro_desc, mg_nls_proj_desc)
  ) matl_wrk_nls,
  rli_pos, rli_sub_pos, released_qty, uom, ros_date, po_number, po_rev, po_description, po_status, status_date,
  po_created_date, po_issue_date, po_approved_date,
  supplier_code, supplier_name, supplier_location, country_of_origin,
  buyer, select_code, payment_mode, commodity_code, ident_code, item_desc,
  poli_pos, poli_sub_pos, account_code_item, poli_uom, poli_qty,
  CAST(unit_price_item AS NUMBER(30,10)) unit_price_item,
  CAST(po_line_item_price AS NUMBER(30,10)) po_line_item_price,
  CAST(ROUND(get_exchange_rate * (poli_qty * poli_unit_price), 2) AS NUMBER(30,10)) po_line_item_price_usd,
  CAST(po_total_cost AS NUMBER(30,10)) po_total_cost,
  CAST(ROUND(get_exchange_rate * (total_price + tax_amount), 2) AS NUMBER(30,10)) po_total_usd,
  po_currency, currency_po_item,
  CAST(discount_percentage AS NUMBER(30,10)) discount_percentage,
  incoterm, delivery_place, Group1, Group2, Group3, Group4, Group5, prom_delivery_date,
  mrr_number, mrr_creation_date, mrr_recv_date, mrr_posted_date, CAST(mrr_quantity AS NUMBER(30,10)) mrr_quantity, is_master_tag
FROM (
  SELECT
    get_poh.proj_id project_id,
    r.r_code requisition_no,
    r.r_supp req_rev,
    dummy_poli.poli_id,
    TO_CHAR(r.created_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') req_date,
    usr_originator.full_name req_originator,
    TO_CHAR(r.rel_to_proc_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') released_to_proc,
    TO_CHAR(r.proc_acknowledge_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') proc_ack_date,
    r.mg_id get_mg_id,
    uv_mdr.attr_value mdr_pack_number,
    rli.rli_pos,
    rli.rli_sub_pos,
    cc.commodity_code,
    i.ident_code,
    i.ident,
    REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(LTRIM(MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM_bir.GET_IDENT_DESC_WITH_DEVIATION(i.ident, dummy_poli.poli_id, 'POLI'), '-'), '^-' || ' ?', ''), CHR(13), ' '), CHR(10), ' '), '- ', '') item_desc,
    rli.total_release_qty released_qty,
    rli.unit_code uom,
    TO_CHAR(rli.estimated_ros_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') ros_date,
    get_poh.poh_id,
    usr_buyer.full_name buyer,
    get_poh.po_number,
    get_poh.po_rev,
    pohn.description po_description,
    dummy_poli.poli_pos,
    dummy_poli.poli_sub_pos,
    (CASE
      WHEN (NVL(tc.total_price, 0) + NVL(dummy_poli.poli_qty, 0) = 0) THEN
        DECODE((SUM(dummy_poli.poli_qty) OVER (PARTITION BY get_poh.poh_id, dummy_poli.poli_id)), 0, 'CANCELLED', get_poh.get_po_status)
      ELSE
        get_poh.get_po_status
    END) po_status,
    get_poh.status_date,
    get_poh.po_created_date,
    get_poh.po_approved_date,
    get_poh.po_issue_date,
    unit_qty.unit_code poli_uom,
    dummy_poli.poli_qty poli_qty,
    uv_select.attr_value select_code,
    uv_payment.attr_value payment_mode,
    sup.company_name supplier_name,
    ms.sup_code supplier_code,
    country_nls.description supplier_location,
    dummy_poli.poli_unit_price unit_price_item,
    ROUND(dummy_poli.poli_qty * dummy_poli.poli_unit_price, 2) po_line_item_price,
    unit_curr.unit_code currency_po_item,
    NVL(get_poh.discount_percent, 0) + NVL(dummy_poli.discount_percent, 0) discount_percentage,
    frt.frt_code incoterm,
    job.job_number account_code_item,
    dummy_poli.freight_value delivery_place,
    rli.attr_group1 Group1,
    rli.attr_group2 Group2,
    rli.attr_group3 Group3,
    rli.attr_group4 Group4,
    rli.attr_group5 Group5,
    proj_attr.attr_char3 attr_char3,
    mg_lookup.mg_code mg_lookup_code,
    mg_nls_mro.description mg_nls_mro_desc,
    mg_nls_proj.description mg_nls_proj_desc,
    ish.prom_contract_date prom_delivery_date,
    cy.cy_code || ' (' || cyn.description || ')' country_of_origin,
    ROUND(tc.total_price + NVL(tc.tax_amount, 0), 2) po_total_cost,
    unit_poh_curr.unit_code po_currency,
    get_poh.get_exchange_rate,
    ish.item_ship_pos,
    ish.item_ship_sub_pos,
    dummy_poli.poli_unit_price poli_unit_price,
    NVL(tc.total_price, 0) total_price,
    NVL(tc.tax_amount, 0) tax_amount,
    ish.item_ship_qty,
    ish.item_ship_id,
    get_mrr1.mrr_id,
    mrr.mrr_number,
    TO_CHAR(mrr.mrr_create_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') mrr_creation_date,
    TO_CHAR(mrr.matl_recv_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') mrr_recv_date,
    TO_CHAR(mrr.posted_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') mrr_posted_date,
    irr_sum.mrr_quantity,
    DECODE(ish_master.cnt, 1, 'Y', NULL) is_master_tag,
    get_poh.proj_id proj_id_for_lookup,
    r.r_id r_id_for_lookup
  FROM m_sys.m_reqs r
  -- Get max r_id using hierarchical query (filtered by proj_id early)
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
      rr.proj_id,
      rr.r_id,
      (SELECT MAX(r1.r_id)
       FROM m_sys.m_reqs r1
       WHERE r1.proj_id = rr.proj_id
         AND r1.actual_ind = 'Y'
         AND r1.approved_date IS NOT NULL
       START WITH r1.r_id = rr.r_id
       CONNECT BY PRIOR r1.r_id = r1.last_r_id) r_id_max
    FROM m_sys.m_reqs rr
    WHERE rr.actual_ind = 'Y'
      AND rr.approved_date IS NOT NULL
      AND rr.proj_id = '@{item()}'
  ) get_max_r ON r.proj_id = get_max_r.proj_id
    AND r.actual_ind = 'Y'
    AND get_max_r.r_id_max = r.r_id
    AND r.proj_id = '@{item()}'
  -- Requirement line items
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
      mrli.proj_id,
      r_id,
      rli_id,
      rli_pos,
      rli_sub_pos,
      total_release_qty,
      estimated_ros_date,
      un.unit_code,
      attr_group1,
      attr_group2,
      attr_group3,
      attr_group4,
      attr_group5
    FROM m_sys.m_req_line_items mrli
    INNER JOIN m_sys.m_units un ON mrli.release_qty_unit_id = un.unit_id
    WHERE mrli.released_ind = 'Y'
  ) rli ON get_max_r.r_id = rli.r_id
  -- PO line items
  INNER JOIN m_sys.m_po_line_items dummy_poli ON rli.rli_id = dummy_poli.rli_id
  -- Get PO line items with max POH (date filters applied early for performance)
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
      max_poh.poh_id,
      max_poh.base_poh_id,
      poli.poli_id,
      max_poh.proj_id
    FROM (
      SELECT
        MAX(poh1.poh_id) poh_id,
        poh1.base_poh_id,
        poh1.proj_id
      FROM m_sys.m_po_headers poh1
      WHERE poh1.po_issue_date IS NOT NULL
        AND TRUNC(poh1.po_issue_date) >= '01-Jan-2024'
      GROUP BY poh1.base_poh_id, poh1.proj_id
    ) max_poh,
    TABLE(MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_PO_LINE_ITEMS(max_poh.poh_id, 'Y')) poli
    WHERE max_poh.poh_id = poli.poh_id
  ) get_poli ON dummy_poli.poli_id = get_poli.poli_id
  -- PO headers with date filters applied early
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
      poh.proj_id,
      poh.poh_id,
      po_number,
      po_supp po_rev,
      sup_id,
      discount_percent,
      TO_CHAR(poh.creation_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') po_created_date,
      TO_CHAR(poh.approved_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') po_approved_date,
      TO_CHAR(poh.po_issue_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') po_issue_date,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_EXCHANGE_RATE_USD(poh.proj_id, SYSDATE, poh.currency_id) get_exchange_rate,
      NVL2(po_close_date, 'CLOSED', NVL2(po_issue_date, 'ISSUED', NVL2(approved_date, 'APPROVED', NVL2(rfa_date, 'FROZEN', 'CONFIRMED')))) get_po_status,
      TO_CHAR(NVL2(po_close_date, po_close_date, NVL2(po_issue_date, po_issue_date, NVL2(approved_date, approved_date, NVL2(rfa_date, rfa_date, lmod)))), 'DD-MON-YYYY') status_date,
      poh.currency_id,
      poh.buyer buyer_id
    FROM m_sys.m_po_headers poh
    WHERE poh.po_issue_date IS NOT NULL
      AND TRUNC(poh.po_issue_date) >= '01-Jan-2024'
  ) get_poh ON get_poh.poh_id = get_poli.poh_id
  -- Identifications
  INNER JOIN m_sys.m_idents i ON i.ident = dummy_poli.ident
  -- Total costs (LEFT JOIN as it may not exist)
  LEFT JOIN m_sys.m_po_total_costs tc ON get_poh.poh_id = tc.poh_id
  -- Suppliers
  INNER JOIN m_sys.m_overview_suppliers ms ON get_poh.sup_id = ms.sup_id
  -- Item shipments (LEFT JOIN as it may not exist)
  LEFT JOIN m_sys.m_item_ships ish ON get_poli.poli_id = ish.poli_id AND ish.proj_id = r.proj_id
  -- MRR aggregation
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      MAX(mrr.mrr_id) mrr_id,
      mrr.proj_id,
      mrr.mrr_number,
      item_ship_id
    FROM m_sys.m_matl_recv_rpts mrr
    INNER JOIN m_sys.m_inv_receipts ir ON mrr.proj_id = ir.proj_id AND mrr.mrr_id = ir.mrr_id
    GROUP BY mrr.proj_id, mrr.mrr_number, item_ship_id
  ) get_mrr1 ON ish.item_ship_id = get_mrr1.item_ship_id
  -- Material Receipt Reports
  LEFT JOIN m_sys.m_matl_recv_rpts mrr ON get_mrr1.mrr_id = mrr.mrr_id
  -- Lookup tables optimized with LEFT JOINs (removed correlated subqueries)
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(u USR_PK) */
      m_usr_id,
      first_name || ' ' || last_name full_name
    FROM m_sys.m_users u
  ) usr_originator ON usr_originator.m_usr_id = r.originator
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(un UNIT_PK) */
      unit_id,
      unit_code
    FROM m_sys.m_units
  ) unit_qty ON unit_qty.unit_id = dummy_poli.qty_unit_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(un UNIT_PK) */
      unit_id,
      unit_code
    FROM m_sys.m_units
  ) unit_curr ON unit_curr.unit_id = dummy_poli.currency_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(c C_PK) */
      company_id,
      company_name
    FROM m_sys.m_companies
  ) sup ON sup.company_id = ms.company_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(frt FRT_PK) */
      frt_id,
      frt_code
    FROM m_sys.m_freight_terms
  ) frt ON frt.frt_id = dummy_poli.frt_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(cc CC_PK) */
      commodity_id,
      commodity_code
    FROM m_sys.m_commodity_codes
  ) cc ON cc.commodity_id = i.commodity_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(j JOB_PK) */
      proj_id,
      job_id,
      job_number
    FROM m_sys.m_jobs
  ) job ON job.proj_id = r.proj_id AND job.job_id = dummy_poli.job_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(c CY_PK) */
      cy_id,
      cy_code
    FROM m_sys.m_countries
  ) cy ON cy.cy_id = dummy_poli.cy_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(cn CYN_PK) */
      cy_id,
      description
    FROM m_sys.m_country_nls
    WHERE nls_id = 1
  ) cyn ON cyn.cy_id = dummy_poli.cy_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      cy_id,
      description
    FROM m_sys.m_country_nls
    WHERE nls_id = 1
  ) country_nls ON country_nls.cy_id = ms.cy_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(un UNIT_PK) */
      unit_id,
      unit_code
    FROM m_sys.m_units
  ) unit_poh_curr ON unit_poh_curr.unit_id = get_poh.currency_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(u USR_PK) */
      m_usr_id,
      first_name || ' ' || last_name full_name
    FROM m_sys.m_users
  ) usr_buyer ON usr_buyer.m_usr_id = get_poh.buyer_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT /*+ index(pohn PHN_PK) */
      poh_id,
      description
    FROM m_sys.m_po_header_nls
    WHERE nls_id = 1
  ) pohn ON pohn.poh_id = get_poh.poh_id
  -- MDR Package Number attribute (used_type = 'ER')
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      uv.proj_id,
      uv.pk_id,
      uv.attr_value
    FROM m_sys.m_used_values uv
    INNER JOIN m_sys.m_attrs att ON uv.attr_id = att.attr_id
    WHERE att.attr_code = 'MDR_PACKAGE_NUMBER'
      AND uv.used_type = 'ER'
  ) uv_mdr ON uv_mdr.proj_id = get_poh.proj_id
    AND uv_mdr.pk_id = r.r_id
  -- SELECT_CODE attribute (used_type = 'PO')
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      uv.proj_id,
      uv.pk_id,
      uv.attr_value
    FROM m_sys.m_used_values uv
    INNER JOIN m_sys.m_attrs att ON uv.attr_id = att.attr_id
    WHERE att.attr_code = 'SELECT_CODE'
      AND uv.used_type = 'PO'
  ) uv_select ON uv_select.proj_id = get_poh.proj_id
    AND uv_select.pk_id = get_poh.poh_id
  -- PAYMENT_MODE attribute (used_type = 'PO')
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      uv.proj_id,
      uv.pk_id,
      uv.attr_value
    FROM m_sys.m_used_values uv
    INNER JOIN m_sys.m_attrs att ON uv.attr_id = att.attr_id
    WHERE att.attr_code = 'PAYMENT_MODE'
      AND uv.used_type = 'PO'
  ) uv_payment ON uv_payment.proj_id = get_poh.proj_id
    AND uv_payment.pk_id = get_poh.poh_id
  -- MRR quantity aggregation
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      mrr_id,
      item_ship_id,
      SUM(recv_qty) mrr_quantity
    FROM m_sys.m_inv_receipts
    GROUP BY mrr_id, item_ship_id
  ) irr_sum ON irr_sum.mrr_id = get_mrr1.mrr_id
    AND irr_sum.item_ship_id = ish.item_ship_id
  -- Master tag check
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      master_ish_id,
      COUNT(1) cnt
    FROM m_sys.m_item_ships
    GROUP BY master_ish_id
    HAVING COUNT(1) = 1
  ) ish_master ON ish_master.master_ish_id = ish.item_ship_id
  -- Project attribute lookup (for attr_char3)
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      proj_id,
      NVL(attr_char3, 'NOTAVAILABLE') attr_char3
    FROM m_sys.m_projects
  ) proj_attr ON proj_attr.proj_id = get_poh.proj_id
  -- Material group lookup for MRO (using r.mg_id)
  LEFT JOIN m_sys.m_material_groups mg_lookup ON mg_lookup.mg_id = r.mg_id
  -- Material group NLS for MRO
  LEFT JOIN m_sys.m_material_group_nls mg_nls_mro ON mg_nls_mro.mg_id = r.mg_id
    AND mg_nls_mro.nls_id = 1
  -- Material group lookup for PROJECT (via mdr_pack_number = mg_code)
  LEFT JOIN m_sys.m_material_groups mg_proj ON mg_proj.mg_code = uv_mdr.attr_value
  LEFT JOIN m_sys.m_material_group_nls mg_nls_proj ON mg_nls_proj.mg_id = mg_proj.mg_id
    AND mg_nls_proj.nls_id = 1
)
ORDER BY project_id, po_number, poli_pos, poli_sub_pos

activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline
